goal: Measure queue processing/reset gas growth and prove the queue is bounded or batch-resumable.
minimal_state: attacker can create many small queue entries
attacker_actions: create N entries over increasing N
assertions: gas remains under block limit for configured batch size
partial processing can resume without double-processing or skipped entries
notes: Derived from existing normalized Code4rena case reports and intended as a reusable validation scaffold, not a protocol-specific PoC.
